scripts.text:
USE P21Import;
SET NOCOUNT ON;

DECLARE @SupplierID int = 40408;
DECLARE @PO_No nvarchar(50) = N'6070052';
DECLARE @SupplierPart nvarchar(100) = N'20290-BLACK';
DECLARE @KomarItem nvarchar(100) = N'20290 BLACK';

SELECT TOP (20)
      'staged_lines' AS result_name
    , p.shipment_file_id
    , f.source_file_name
    , f.trailer_name
    , p.shipment_pallet_line_id
    , p.source_row_number
    , p.Bin_ID
    , p.Item_ID
    , p.komar_item_id
    , p.PO_No
    , p.Invoiced_Qty
    , p.po_line_uid
    , p.cancel_flag
    , p.missing_supplier_part_flag
    , p.has_duplicate_supplier_part
FROM dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_pallet_line AS p
JOIN dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_file AS f
  ON f.shipment_file_id = p.shipment_file_id
WHERE p.PO_No = @PO_No
  AND (p.Item_ID = @SupplierPart OR p.komar_item_id = @KomarItem)
ORDER BY p.created_at_utc DESC, p.shipment_pallet_line_id;

SELECT
      'inventory_supplier_exact' AS result_name
    , ivs.supplier_id
    , ivs.supplier_part_no
    , ivs.inv_mast_uid
    , ivm.item_id
    , ivm.delete_flag
FROM dbo.inventory_supplier AS ivs
JOIN dbo.inv_mast AS ivm
  ON ivm.inv_mast_uid = ivs.inv_mast_uid
WHERE ivs.supplier_id = @SupplierID
  AND (ivs.supplier_part_no = @SupplierPart OR ivm.item_id = @KomarItem)
ORDER BY ivs.supplier_part_no, ivm.item_id;

SELECT
      'po_line_for_item' AS result_name
    , pol.po_no
    , pol.po_line_uid
    , pol.line_no
    , pol.inv_mast_uid
    , ivm.item_id
    , pol.complete
    , pol.cancel_flag
    , pol.qty_ordered
    , pol.qty_received
    , pol.unit_of_measure
    , ivm.default_purchasing_unit
FROM dbo.po_line AS pol
JOIN dbo.inv_mast AS ivm
  ON ivm.inv_mast_uid = pol.inv_mast_uid
WHERE pol.po_no = @PO_No
  AND (ivm.item_id = @KomarItem OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM dbo.inventory_supplier AS ivs
      WHERE ivs.inv_mast_uid = pol.inv_mast_uid
        AND ivs.supplier_id = @SupplierID
        AND ivs.supplier_part_no = @SupplierPart
  ))
ORDER BY pol.po_line_uid;

SELECT
      'validator_candidate_current' AS result_name
    , p.shipment_pallet_line_id
    , p.Item_ID
    , p.PO_No
    , pol.po_line_uid
    , pol.complete
    , pol.cancel_flag
    , ivm.item_id
    , ivs.supplier_part_no
FROM dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_pallet_line AS p
JOIN dbo.po_line AS pol
  ON pol.po_no = p.PO_No
 AND (pol.complete <> 'Y' OR ISNULL(pol.cancel_flag, 'N') = 'Y')
JOIN dbo.inv_mast AS ivm
  ON ivm.inv_mast_uid = pol.inv_mast_uid
 AND ISNULL(ivm.delete_flag, 'N') <> 'Y'
JOIN dbo.inventory_supplier AS ivs
  ON ivs.inv_mast_uid = ivm.inv_mast_uid
 AND ivs.supplier_id = @SupplierID
 AND ivs.supplier_part_no = p.Item_ID
WHERE p.PO_No = @PO_No
  AND p.Item_ID = @SupplierPart
ORDER BY p.shipment_pallet_line_id, pol.po_line_uid;

SELECT TOP (20)
      'validation_issues' AS result_name
    , i.shipment_file_id
    , i.issue_code
    , i.message
    , i.source_row_number
    , i.Bin_ID
    , i.Item_ID
    , i.PO_No
FROM dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_validation_issue AS i
WHERE i.PO_No = @PO_No
  AND i.Item_ID = @SupplierPart
ORDER BY i.validation_issue_id DESC;
